title: EDEN portable-checkpoint manifest
description: Top-level descriptor for a portable checkpoint archive, per spec/v0/10-checkpoints.md §5. Carries format + spec version, source experiment id, exporter metadata, and the per-component file paths within the archive. Every consumer MUST validate the manifest against this schema before reading other archive contents.

checkpoint_format_version.description: Version of the portable-checkpoint format specified by spec/v0/10-checkpoints.md. v0 of the EDEN spec ships format version '1'. Importers MUST reject unrecognized values with eden://error/unsupported-checkpoint-version.

spec_version.description: EDEN spec version the contained data conforms to (currently 'v0'). Importers MUST reject mismatched values with eden://error/spec-version-mismatch.

experiment_id.description: The source experiment's id. The receiving deployment uses this verbatim unless an as_experiment_id override is supplied at import time (spec/v0/07-wire-protocol.md §14.2).

exported_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp at which the source snapshot was taken. Normative: serves as the recovery-probe anchor (10-checkpoints.md §10) and the value stored on the importer's Experiment.imported_from.checkpoint_exported_at field.

exporter.description: Informative metadata describing the producing implementation. Consumers MUST NOT key behavior on its contents; it exists for operator debugging.

implementation.description: Free-form identifier of the exporting impl (e.g., 'eden-reference/0.x').

atomicity_mechanism.description: Free-form indicator of which §6 atomicity strategy was used (e.g., 'transactional_snapshot', 'quiesce_and_dump').

requires_credential_reissue.description: When true, the importer MUST mint fresh credentials for every imported worker (spec/v0/10-checkpoints.md §8). v0 producers MUST set this to true.

counts.description: Informative per-component object counts. Consumers MAY use this for early validation; the authoritative count is the actual line count of each JSONL file.

files.description: Per-component file paths within the archive. Implementations MUST emit each file at the named path; the fixed shape below is the v0 contract.
